overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy featuring a student character in wizard robes exploring a magical castle. The clip transitions through diverse environments including a library study hall, outdoor courtyard with ancient stone ruins, and grand interior staircases, showcasing detailed gothic architecture and NPC students.

events.description: character stands up from study table and begins walking toward exit

agents.ego_description: student character initially seated reading at a wooden table, then stands and walks toward the library exit

notable_agents.action: student sitting at distant table reading books

entered.detail: large wooden table with books and papers scattered on surface
high vaulted gothic ceiling with ribbed stone arches
ornate hanging chandelier with multiple candles
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books against the wall
tall arched window letting in natural light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a grand castle library with high vaulted stone ceilings and wooden study tables. A student sits reading before standing up and walking toward a wooden door exit, while another student studies in the background near tall bookshelves.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with arches leading to courtyard

events.description: character opens wooden door and exits library into covered stone corridor
approaching outdoor courtyard with increasing natural light

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered stone corridor with arches on the sides

entered.detail: stone archway forming the corridor passage
large potted plant in stone container
wooden cabinet with glass doors containing artifacts

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a transitional stone corridor with arches, leaving the library behind. The space features stone tile flooring and potted plants, with bright daylight visible ahead indicating an exit to an outdoor area.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle courtyard garden with ancient stone ruins

events.description: exits covered corridor into open outdoor courtyard with greenery

agents.ego_description: walking along cobblestone path through the garden courtyard

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking across the grass lawn

entered.detail: ancient stone ruins with arches and weathered walls
tall dense green hedge lining the path
well-maintained green grass area
stone fountain structure in the courtyard center
stone bench for seating along the path

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a sunlit courtyard garden surrounded by ancient stone ruins and arches. The cobblestone path winds through dense greenery and hedges, with a stone fountain visible on the lawn where other students walk or sit on benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle entrance vestibule with heavy wooden door

events.description: approaching and entering large wooden door to re-enter the castle
entering darker interior space from bright outdoor courtyard

agents.ego_description: approaching and opening a large ornate wooden door to enter the building

entered.detail: large heavy wooden door with iron studs and ornate carvings
stone archway framing the entrance door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive ornate wooden door set in a stone frame, transitioning from the bright outdoor courtyard into a dimly lit interior vestibule. The heavy door opens to reveal a grand hall beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase hall with stained glass windows

events.description: beginning to ascend the grand staircase
approaching large stained glass windows casting colored light

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase, passing landings and turning at switchbacks

notable_agents.action: student descending the stairs while walking down

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with multiple flights and landings
ornate stone balustrade along the staircase
large stone column supporting the ceiling
tall stained glass window with colorful panes depicting figures
stone statue on pedestal at landing

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a magnificent grand staircase within the castle, featuring wide stone steps, ornate railings, and massive stained glass windows that cast colorful light onto the marble floors. Other students are seen descending the stairs as the character climbs past stone pillars and statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper castle hallway with portraits and windows

events.description: exiting staircase into upper hallway corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper hallway passing groups of conversing students

notable_agents.action: group of three students standing and conversing in the corridor

entered.detail: large framed portrait hanging on the stone wall
tall arched window with multiple panes letting in light
wooden bench against the wall for seating
decorative stone column along the corridor

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper level, the character walks along a corridor lined with framed portraits and arched windows. The hallway features marble flooring and stone columns, with groups of students gathered and conversing along the walls near wooden benches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the quiet, enclosed atmosphere of a castle library into a bright, open-air courtyard. It begins within a grand study hall featuring high vaulted stone ceilings and wooden tables, where a student rises from their seat and walks toward a wooden exit. As the character leaves the library, the scene shifts into a transitional stone corridor characterized by arched ceilings, tiled flooring, and potted plants. The camera then follows the character toward a burst of daylight, emerging from the corridor into a sunlit garden surrounded by ancient stone ruins. Finally, the view expands across a cobblestone path winding through dense greenery and hedges toward a stone fountain where other students gather.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright outdoor courtyard into the opulent, light-filled interiors of the magical castle. It begins as the character approaches a massive ornate wooden door, moving from the open air into a dimly lit vestibule before the heavy doors swing open to reveal a grand hall. As the character advances, the scene shifts to a magnificent ascent up a grand staircase, where colorful light from massive stained glass windows spills across marble floors and stone pillars. The movement then carries the character to the upper level, expanding into a long corridor lined with framed portraits and arched windows. Finally, the camera glides past groups of conversing students and wooden benches along the marble hallway, completing the journey from the exterior ruins to the heart of the school.
